descriptions.text:
Get ready to experience the beloved puzzle game Toki Tori like never before in the Ultimate Edition, remastered to offer smoother gameplay and modern enhancements. Join the courageous Toki Tori as he embarks on a quest to rescue his kidnapped, unhatched siblings, solving challenging puzzles across more than 60 exciting levels.

This remaster includes exclusive updates that improve the original experience, including:
- Faster movement
- Auto-jump
- No more pesky timer
- Faster navigation
Are you up for the challenge? Armed with an arsenal of ingenious tools and weapons, Toki Tori must use his wits to overcome dangerous obstacles and face increasingly tricky challenges.
